modules.name: KStack_Catalog
modules.description: Products, variants, images, collections and inventory management

modules.name: KStack_Collections
modules.description: Product collections (categories) with product membership management

modules.name: KStack_Orders
modules.description: Order creation, line items, order status and fulfilment management

modules.name: KStack_Customers
modules.description: Customer accounts, profiles, order history and authentication

modules.name: KStack_Coupons
modules.description: Discount codes — percentage, fixed amount, and free shipping

modules.name: KStack_Shipping
modules.description: Shipping rates and methods (flat rate, free over amount, always free)

modules.name: KStack_Reviews
modules.description: Product reviews submission and admin moderation

modules.name: KStack_Storefront
modules.description: Themes, theme settings, drag-and-drop page builder and block rendering

modules.name: KStack_Integrations
modules.description: Third-party service integrations (payment, analytics, marketing, etc.)

modules.name: KStack_Analytics
modules.description: Store analytics: revenue, orders, top products and customer stats

modules.name: KStack_Wishlist
modules.description: Customer wishlist stored client-side (localStorage)

modules.name: KStack_Loader
modules.description: Loading skeletons and spinners for dashboard and storefront route transitions

modules.name: KStack_Email
modules.description: SMTP configuration, editable email templates, transactional emails (order confirmation, shipping, welcome, password reset), email logs and compose from customer panel

modules.name: KStack_AIAssistant
modules.description: AI-powered product descriptions, customer chatbot that learns from store content, and smart product recommendations

modules.name: KStack_Realtime
modules.description: Live inventory updates, real-time purchase notifications and cross-device cart sync via WebSockets

modules.name: KStack_SmartCart
modules.description: Upsell and cross-sell suggestions, bundle recommendations and dynamic pricing rules

modules.name: KStack_Personalization
modules.description: Geo-based content and pricing, behavior-based recommendations and personalized homepages

modules.name: KStack_Marketplace
modules.description: Third-party plugin and app marketplace for payments, shipping providers and custom business tools

modules.name: KStack_Headless
modules.description: Public REST/GraphQL API with SDKs for external storefront and multi-platform integration development

modules.name: KStack_ShoppableMedia
modules.description: Clickable products in videos, interactive product showcases and social commerce integration

modules.name: KStack_FraudDetection
modules.description: Risk scoring for orders, suspicious activity detection and IP/behavior tracking

modules.name: KStack_Automation
modules.description: Rule-based workflows (IF→THEN), automated emails/notifications and inventory/order triggers

modules.name: KStack_MobileAdmin
modules.description: Mobile merchant app with push notifications for orders and stock alerts, and on-the-go analytics

modules.name: KStack_IoT
modules.description: Smart inventory tracking, device-triggered automation and voice-controlled store management
